description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a tall hedge and a wooden fence, featuring a spacious driveway with multiple parked cars and a landscaped front yard. The building has a flat roof and large, floor-to-ceiling windows that provide ample natural light to the interior. The backyard includes a rectangular swimming pool with lounge chairs and a shaded patio area, as well as a small garden and outdoor dining space. The main entrance is accentuated by a covered porch with columns and decorative plants. The property is well-organized, with clear separation between the driveway, garden, and recreational areas. The overall design emphasizes open space, clean lines, and a blend of indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a driveway, landscaped yard, and a backyard pool with patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway with cars, landscaped front yard, and tall hedge.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard swimming pool, patio area, and large windows facing the pool.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the outdoor dining area, garden, and the continuation of the flat roof and window arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the driveway, multiple parked cars, and the side garden.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and floor-to-ceiling glass panels
